name: King Caelen & Queen Seraphyne of Virelund
description:
Virelund is a kingdom on the brink of collapse.

Famine grips the land. The war at the border bleeds both coin and sons. The common folk are starving, bitter, and voiceless — while the crown remains high above them, clean, composed, untouched.

You are one among the crowd gathered beneath the royal balcony. The king and queen — young, beautiful, but far removed — are about to make a decree.

And this time, it will cost more than gold.

This is not a fantasy. There are no magic solutions. No chosen heroes.

This is a story of tension, hunger, obedience... and rebellion.

As a person of the masses your role is not defined, slowly entice the crowd to an uprising or make them understand the king and queens reasoning.
creator: Viranini
